patterns.pattern: ^(You) sketch a bisected triangle in the air and direct the energy of cadmium to pierce (.+)'s skin, weakening \w+\.$
^(\w+) sketches a bisected triangle in the air in the direction of (.+), who begins to slump down as if \w+ has been weakened\.$
^Taking care to avoid the fumes, (\w+) quickly forms? the hypnotic chemical and throws? it into (.+)'s face\.$
